info.name: FoodOrder.Consumer.Delivery - DeliveryOrderController
info.description: API endpoints for reading and deleting SQS messages in the Delivery consumer service

query.description: Maximum number of messages to retrieve (1-10)

request.description:
Retrieves pending delivery orders from the SQS queue.

Parameters:
- maxMessages: Maximum number of messages to retrieve (1-10, default: 10)
- waitTimeSeconds: Long-polling wait time (0-20 seconds, default: 5)

Returns:
- count: Number of messages received
- messages: Array of message objects with MessageId, ReceiptHandle, Body, Attributes, and MessageAttributes

Deletes a processed delivery order message from the SQS queue.

Request Body:
- receiptHandle: The receipt handle obtained from the GET messages endpoint

Returns:
- 204 No Content on success
- 400 Bad Request if receiptHandle is missing
- 500 Internal Server Error on failure
Retrieves a single message with short polling (immediate return if no messages available)
